changeSet.author: nexus-t1hnc.1
changeSet.comment: taxonomy_centroids_384: tenant-isolated pgvector centroid table for 384-dim embeddings (MiniLM)
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE nexus.taxonomy_centroids_384 ( tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, collection TEXT NOT NULL, topic_id BIGINT NOT NULL, embedding vector(384) NOT NULL, label TEXT, doc_count INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT taxonomy_centroids_384_pk PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, collection, topic_id) );
CREATE INDEX idx_taxonomy_centroids_384_embedding ON nexus.taxonomy_centroids_384 USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (m = 16, ef_construction = 64);
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.taxonomy_centroids_384 CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-t1hnc.1
changeSet.comment: taxonomy_centroids_768: tenant-isolated pgvector centroid table for 768-dim embeddings
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE nexus.taxonomy_centroids_768 ( tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, collection TEXT NOT NULL, topic_id BIGINT NOT NULL, embedding vector(768) NOT NULL, label TEXT, doc_count INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT taxonomy_centroids_768_pk PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, collection, topic_id) );
CREATE INDEX idx_taxonomy_centroids_768_embedding ON nexus.taxonomy_centroids_768 USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (m = 16, ef_construction = 64);
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.taxonomy_centroids_768 CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-t1hnc.1
changeSet.comment: taxonomy_centroids_1024: tenant-isolated pgvector centroid table for 1024-dim embeddings (Voyage AI)
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE nexus.taxonomy_centroids_1024 ( tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, collection TEXT NOT NULL, topic_id BIGINT NOT NULL, embedding vector(1024) NOT NULL, label TEXT, doc_count INTEGER, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT taxonomy_centroids_1024_pk PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, collection, topic_id) );
CREATE INDEX idx_taxonomy_centroids_1024_embedding ON nexus.taxonomy_centroids_1024 USING hnsw (embedding vector_cosine_ops) WITH (m = 16, ef_construction = 64);
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.taxonomy_centroids_1024 CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-t1hnc.1
changeSet.comment: Enable and FORCE RLS; create tenant_isolation policy on the three taxonomy_centroids tables
